sentences.text_original: 听说你要搬家，找到新房子了吗？
sentences.pinyin: Tīngshuō nǐ yào bānjiā, zhǎodào xīn fángzi le ma?
sentences.text_translation: Eshitishimcha ko'chmoqchi ekansan, yangi uy topdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я слышал, ты собираешься переезжать — нашёл новое жильё?
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard you're moving — have you found a new place?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 还没有。我最近在租房平台上看了一些，但还没决定。
sentences.pinyin: Hái méiyǒu. Wǒ zuìjìn zài zūfáng píngtái shàng kàn le yì xiē, dàn hái méi juédìng.
sentences.text_translation: Hali yo'q. Yaqinda uy ijara platformasida bir nechtasini ko'rdim, lekin hali qaror qilmadim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пока нет. Недавно посмотрел несколько вариантов на платформе для аренды, но ещё не решил.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. I've looked at some on a rental platform recently, but haven't decided.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我用自如和贝壳，这两个平台房源比较多。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yòng Zìrú hé Bèiké, zhè liǎng ge píngtái fángyuán bǐjiào duō.
sentences.text_translation: Ziru va Beike'dan foydalanaman, bu ikki platformada uy variantlari ancha ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пользуюсь Ziru и Beike — на этих двух платформах вариантов жилья побольше.
sentences.text_translation_en: I use Ziru and Beike — these two platforms have more listings.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ juéde nǎ ge gèng hǎoyòng?
sentences.text_translation_en: Which do you think is easier to use?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 自如的房子装修比较好，但是价格贵一些。贝壳的房源多，选择更多。
sentences.pinyin: Zìrú de fángzi zhuāngxiū bǐjiào hǎo, dànshì jiàgé guì yì xiē. Bèiké de fángyuán duō, xuǎnzé gèng duō.
sentences.text_translation: Ziru'dagi uylarning ta'miri ancha yaxshi, lekin narxi biroz qimmat. Beike'da uy variantlari ko'p, tanlov kengroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У Ziru жильё с лучшим ремонтом, но цена повыше. У Beike вариантов больше, и выбор шире.
sentences.text_translation_en: Ziru's places have better renovation but cost a bit more. Beike has more listings, so more choice.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zhǎo fángzi zuì kànzhòng shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Uy izlaganda eng ko'p nimaga ahamiyat berasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что для тебя важнее всего при поиске жилья?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you value most when looking for a place?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 首先是位置，离公司近一点。然后是价格，不能太贵。
sentences.pinyin: Shǒuxiān shì wèizhi, lí gōngsī jìn yì diǎn. Ránhòu shì jiàgé, bùnéng tài guì.
sentences.text_translation: Avvalo joylashuv, ofisga yaqinroq bo'lsin. Keyin narx, juda qimmat bo'lmasligi kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В первую очередь расположение, поближе к работе. Потом цена — не должна быть слишком высокой.
sentences.text_translation_en: First the location — a bit closer to the office. Then the price — it can't be too expensive.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn le jǐ tào le?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many places have you viewed?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看了三套。有一套还不错，但是厨房有点小。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn le sān tào. Yǒu yí tào hái búcuò, dànshì chúfáng yǒu diǎn xiǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Uchtasini ko'rdim. Bittasi yomon emas, lekin oshxonasi biroz kichik.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Посмотрел три. Одна вполне ничего, но кухня немного маловата.
sentences.text_translation_en: I've seen three. One is pretty good, but the kitchen is a bit small.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yuē le zhōngjiè kàn fáng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Uyni ko'rish uchun vositachi bilan kelishdingmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты договорился с агентом о просмотре?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you arranged with an agent to view places?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 约了，周末去看另外两套。
sentences.pinyin: Yuē le, zhōumò qù kàn lìngwài liǎng tào.
sentences.text_translation: Kelishdim, dam olish kunlari boshqa ikkitasini ko'rgani boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Договорился, на выходных пойду смотреть ещё две.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have — I'm going to see another two this weekend.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 平台上照片和实际房子差别大吗？
sentences.pinyin: Píngtái shàng zhàopiàn hé shíjì fángzi chābié dà ma?
sentences.text_translation: Platformadagi rasmlar bilan haqiqiy uy o'rtasida farq kattami?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Велика ли разница между фото на платформе и реальным жильём?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is there a big difference between the photos on the platform and the actual place?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有时候会有差别。照片看起来很大，实际没那么大。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu shíhou huì yǒu chābié. Zhàopiàn kàn qǐlái hěn dà, shíjì méi nàme dà.
sentences.text_translation: Ba'zan farq bo'ladi. Rasmda katta ko'rinadi, aslida unchalik katta emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Иногда разница есть. На фото выглядит большой, а на деле не такой уж и большой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sometimes there is. In photos it looks big, but in reality it's not that big.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Shuning uchun o'zing borib ko'rishing kerak.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's why you need to go see it in person.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，看房很重要。照片不能全信。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, kàn fáng hěn zhòngyào. Zhàopiàn bùnéng quán xìn.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri, uyni ko'rish juda muhim. Rasmlarga to'liq ishonib bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, осмотр жилья очень важен. Фотографиям нельзя полностью верить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right, viewing the place is important. You can't fully trust the photos.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 如果找到合适的，就早点定下来吧。
sentences.pinyin: Rúguǒ zhǎodào héshì de, jiù zǎo diǎn dìng xiàlái ba.
sentences.text_translation: Mos kelganini topsang, tezroq qaror qilib qo'ya qol.
sentences.text_translation_en: If you find a suitable one, settle on it sooner rather than later.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我也是这么想的。希望这周末能找到满意的。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě shì zhème xiǎng de. Xīwàng zhè zhōumò néng zhǎodào mǎnyì de.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham shunday o'ylayapman. Shu dam olish kuni ko'ngildagidek uy topishni umid qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже так думаю. Надеюсь, в эти выходные найду что-то по душе.
sentences.text_translation_en: I think so too. I hope I can find one I'm happy with this weekend.
sentences.speaker: B
